name: Operation Deep Nebula
objectives: Map gravitational anomalies within the Frontier Sector 7 perimeter
Collect spectral data from the Veil Nebula remnant
Establish a long-range communication relay at waypoint Sigma-14

name: Titan Survey Alpha
objectives: Perform sonar mapping of Titan's northern subsurface ocean basin
Deploy three autonomous mineral-analysis drones
Assess viability for a permanent research outpost

name: Sigma-9 Resource Extraction
objectives: Extract 12 metric tons of rare-earth minerals from designated mining sites
Retrieve automated cargo pods left during Mission MSN-000
Survey asteroid drift patterns for future extraction windows

name: Europa Deep Descent
objectives: Descend to the Europan hydrothermal vent field at 14 km depth
Collect biological samples from chemosynthetic ecosystems
Test new pressure-rated habitat modules for extended deep-ocean stays

name: Helix Comet Intercept
objectives: Match velocity with Comet Helix-7 during its perihelion approach
Deploy surface probes to analyze volatile outgassing composition
Capture high-resolution imagery of the nucleus surface features

name: Obsidian Outpost Rescue
objectives: Evacuate 7 stranded researchers from Obsidian Outpost after hull breach
Stabilize station reactor to prevent meltdown
Retrieve critical xenobiology samples before station decommission

name: Phantom Rift Survey
objectives: Chart boundaries of the Phantom Rift gravitational distortion
Deploy quantum-shielded sensor buoys at 5 AU intervals
Test experimental dark-matter detection array
